Our Story

11 years ago, Jaime Schmidt said "I quit" to expectations of her career and the deodorant status quo. We believe that saying "no" works. Our plant and mineral-based deodorants give you all day odor protection without aluminum salts, artificial fragrance, parabens, and phthalates.

Stay fresh with exclusive info and promotions
